meaning: n.[天]能层("黑洞"周围假设的封闭区)
examples: This spinning area surrounding the event horizon is called the ergosphere and has an ellipsoidal shape.
The ergosphere becomes thicker and the Hawking temperature changes when the mass of the black hole decreases.
However, because space-time itself is moving in the ergosphere, it is impossible for objects to remain in a fixed position.
